pages.text: $(o)"What breaks isn't just the blade — it's the trace of how we used it."$()$(br2)Smithwright School's reflection. Iron has a finite life, but here is one chance to stand again.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Within $(l)6 blocks$():$(br)· Collect up to 64 damaged tools/armor across players$(br)· Distribute $(l)1800 durability$() of repair$(br)· Any item repaired $(l)100+$() grants the owner Speed I (10s)$(br2)Cost: $(l)2400$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Team-repair scroll. All 1800 onto one masterwork, or spread across a kit — both work.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 2 Wellspring$() or above.
